brightBars.name: Flats Bars
brightBars.projectInfo:
Devasya Industries hold expertise in offering a high quality range of BRIGHT FLATS BAR to our clients. Our offered flat is manufactured using optimum quality raw material and innovative technology by skilled professionals. The provided flats are available in variegated sizes and specifications. Furthermore, this flat is tested on different quality measures in order to ensure its quality. Clients can avail this flat from us at pocket friendly price.

‍

‍

Our products meet customer demands for:

  • Size control
  • Increased tensile and yield strengths
  • Optimum machine ability
    ‍

Extensive capability

As a specialized producer of bright bar, our facilities include:

  • High-tech drawing lines
  • Peeling lines
  • Heat treatment facilities
  • Ultrasonic inspection
  • Crack detection
  • Facing and chamfering
  • Precision sawing

Our heat treatment capability includes spheroidise annealing, annealing to hardness or grain structure, normalizing, stress relieving, quench and tempering.
‍

Specifications:

All Types of Grades LIKE: IS2062, Alloy Steel, Carbon steel, En1A, En8, En8D, En24, SAE 1040, SAE 1045, SAE 1050, 35C8, 45C8 & Many More.

ssProducts.name: Cold Heading Wire
ssProducts.projectInfo:
‍

Special Characteristics

  • Excellent in corrosion resistance and mechanical strength and is the most suitable material for bolts, nuts, screw, Philips head screw and other types of fasteners and has marked work hardening characteristics.

Supply Condition

  • Wires are vicafil coated to ensure smooth heading operations & crackfree heads. Condition: Cold Drawn, Annealed and Skin Pass or as per customer requirement with very fine tolerance.

Click Here to View Chemical Composition

ssProducts.name: Wire For Nails
ssProducts.projectInfo:
‍

‍

Specification

  • Superior corrosion resistance under condition of application
  • Completely resistant to tannic acid & other extractive common to wood & will not discolor the wood surrounding the nail head
  • Strength is adequate for all wood application
  • Driving the nail into wood does not split the wood

ssProducts.name: Free Cutting Wire
ssProducts.projectInfo:
Specification

  • For Specific work requirements, free-cutting wire of stainless must be selected taking such factors into consideration as fatigue, usage, strength, corrosion resistance, impact resistance etc. Sulphur (S) is added by about 0.15% to 0.35% to improve machinability.

Click Here to View Chemical Composition

ssProducts.name: Wire For Springs
ssProducts.projectInfo:
‍

Specification

  • Stainless Steel Wire for spring is made from the selected steel In particular, to provide optimum spring efficiency, this type of wire is painstakingly finished to eliminate flaws which reduce fatigue strength, i.e. lateral and longitudinal cracks, pits and marks. Their mechanical properties are produced as per customer's requirements.
  • HIL Spring wires are produced joint free in one continuous length.

ssProducts.name: Lashing Wire
ssProducts.projectInfo:
‍

Specification Characteristics

  • Lashing wire could be ferritic or austentic grades
  • High ductility with minimum of 20% elongation
  • Wire is packed with plastic ties to provide consistent package tension.

ssProducts.name: Chain Wire
Wire For Conveyor Belt
ssProducts.projectInfo:
Special Characteristics

  • Weaving Wires are supplied in bright annealed condition.
  • Weaving Wires have beautiful lustrous surfaces and have high resistance to corrosion which combine to account for their profit and yielding market values.
  • Weaving Wires are available in full range of sizes from extra-large to extra-fine diameters.
  • Weaving Wires are suitable for various applications in chemicals, petrochemicals, synthetic, fiber, paper and pulp industries, conveyor belts operating in high temperature environment etc.

ssProducts.name: Electrode Quality Wire
ssProducts.projectInfo:
Devasya manufactures high quality stainless steel wire for welding electrodes as well as Tig wires.

We offer various types of wires for welding consumables ( Electrodes, Tig Wires), in compliance with international quality standards. Our range of wires have shiny surface and controlled mechanical properties. These wires offer excellent resistance to cracking, scaling and corrosion at high temperatures. Available in various specifications, we also customize these wires as per clients specifications.

The stainless steel wires for welding electrodes and Tig wires are supplied in coil as well as in cut length as per AWS, DIN, BS, JIS and other equivalent international standards or as per the customer's requirement.

The grades and Technical details are below.

Specification

  • Good weldability
  • Stainless Steel Electrode Quality wires have superior corrosion resistance
